name: Albert Coates
abstract: Albert Coates (* 11 jul./23 April 1881greg. [deviant: 1882] – 11 December 1953) was an English conductor and composer.

concerts.label: Gala Concert for the Walter Damrosch Fellowship (American Academy in Rome)

works.t: Symphony No. 1 in C Minor, Op. 68: 4. Adagio – Più andante – Allegro non troppo, ma con brio – Più allegro

about_quotes.speaker: Skitch Henderson
about_quotes.evidence: Victor Young said there was a wonderful gentlemen by the name of Albert Coates... And Victor Young said, 'If you had any brains you’d go take some conducting lessons right now.'
about_quotes.doc_title: Skitch Henderson interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Milford, Connecticut, October 31, 1998
